matches.x: PSALM XXT. A thanksgiving for blessings. To. the chief Musician, A Psalm of David. HE king shall joy in thy strength, O Lord; and in thy salvation how greatly shall he rejoice!

12 (With) the crown of pure gold *<(resting) upon? the mitre’, The diadem engraven, ‘ Holy to Jahveh ’?—

And to the skirts of Thy mercies I will lay hold until Thou hast had mercy on me, And I will not let Thee go till Thou hast blessed me.
